title: The T/NK immune synapse spans a cleft of ~15 nm
~22% of CAR-T cells sequentially kill multiple targets (serial killing)
Cord-blood CD19 CAR-NK cells achieved 73% (8/11) overall response in a Phase 1 trial
VivoVec lentiviral in-vivo CAR-T generation sustained B-cell depletion beyond 10 weeks in NHPs

context.condition: in-vivo-generated CD20 CAR-T via VivoVec lentiviral vector

title: The cellular effector is best modeled as a generic actuator decoupled from its targeting/sensing logic

leaf.data: The cytotoxic or suppressive effector module (the kill/suppress machinery) is logically and architecturally separable from the sensing/targeting logic that triggers it.
leaf.warrant: Universal/adapter CARs (anti-FITC, BBIR, UniCAR, SpyTag/SpyCatcher) route arbitrary targeting molecules to one fixed kill engine, and in-vivo CAR generation (LNP-mRNA, lentivirus) manufactures a generic effector in situ independent of any specific sensor — both independent 2024-2026 technology trends converge on the same sense/act decoupling.

title: Cytotoxic CAR chassis are rate- and dose-limited by exhaustion and tonic signaling, not by per-kill potency

leaf.data: CAR-T/NK killing capacity is bounded chiefly by chronic-stimulation exhaustion and antigen-independent tonic CD3zeta signaling, not by the intrinsic lethality of a single perforin/granzyme hit.
leaf.warrant: Lynn et al. (2019) showed a tonically signaling high-affinity GD2 CAR (HA-28z) exhausts via scFv aggregation and an AP-1-imbalanced, chromatin-opened transcriptional state, and that overexpressing c-Jun rendered the cells exhaustion-resistant and restored potency, demonstrating the rate limit is a programmable circuit state rather than a fixed ceiling on per-kill lethality.

title: The optimal CAR affinity is detuned, not maximized, because higher affinity increases tonic signaling and exhaustion

leaf.data: Higher-affinity, more aggregation-prone scFvs signal harder and exhaust CAR cells faster, so the affinity that maximizes sustained killing is below the maximum achievable affinity.
leaf.warrant: CAR synapses are disorganized/non-classical, with faster lytic-granule recruitment and faster target detachment than a TCR synapse, so a CAR's value depends on its off-rate from a dying cell as much as its affinity: too sticky and the killer is monogamous, and higher affinity independently drives more scFv-aggregation-induced tonic signaling and earlier exhaustion.

title: The effector becomes a platform commodity rented by a library of sensors (narrative synthesis)
Tregs as the chassis run in reverse: tolerance and cytotoxicity as two outputs of one programmable effector (narrative synthesis)
